  2. Classes and Interfaces

Package model

package model
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Airport
    Represents an Airport location with specific properties such as the number of terminals.
    City
    Represents a City location with specific properties such as population.
    GasStation
    Represents a Gas Station location with specific properties such as gas prices.
    Location
    An abstract sealed class representing a generic location in a Cartesian coordinate system.
    Problem
    Describes an instance of the Best Route problem.
    Road
    Represents a connecting road between two locations with a specific type, length, and speed limit.
    Route
    Represents a routing connection composed of two endpoints (locations) and the road connecting them.
